message:
fix(wills-estate): soften technical jargon in install section

- "returns a 404" → "shows a page-not-found screen" (two instances)
- "Thirty seconds pass" → "After a short wait"

Non-technical readers shouldn't need to know HTTP status codes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

@@ -819,7 +876,7 @@ export function WillsEstateArticle() {

Step 4. The agent will read the prompt, show you a “Would you like to allow this command?” dialog (for the - download), click Allow. Thirty seconds pass. The + download), click Allow. After a short wait, the agent will tell you the skill has been installed and ask you to reload skills. On Claude Desktop that is ⌘-Shift-P → “Reload skills”; on Codex Desktop, quit and reopen.
